## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session to review content strategy and next steps for Breyta's SEO content program](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content OS developed with 820+ potential topics across multiple categories](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Will start with 1-2 calibration articles to refine process before scaling](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Existing Webflow blog template can be leveraged, with potential for programmatic CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Strong early results from paid ads (40% activation rate) provide opportunity to amplify with organic content](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Overview

  - [Content OS developed with 820+ potential topics across multiple categories](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Categories include: AI automation, role-specific tasks, research optimization, role-specific guides, AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Aim to balance high search volume topics with high business relevance](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [Will start with 1-2 calibration articles to refine process before scaling](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [AI-generated first drafts with human editing and oversight](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [Focus on programmatic approach to enable scaling, while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [Will iterate based on Chris's feedback to improve output](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [Balance between perfect content and launching to get market signals](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)

### Website and Templates

  - [Existing Webflow blog template can be leveraged](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Potential for programmatic CTAs based on article content](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Need to consider best template approach based on competing content in SERPs](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)

### Analytics and Tracking

  - [Using PostHog for analytics, which offers web analytics, product analytics, and session replays](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=2284.0)
  - [Can track events like blog views, file uploads, sign-ups, and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=2829.0)
  - [Ability to create funnels to track user progression through site](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=2956.0)

### Current Performance

  - [Strong results from Google Ads: 150 sign-ups daily from one ad group on one keyword](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=2649.0)
  - [$10 cost per signup with 40% activation rate](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=2666.0)
  - [14% conversion rate from visitors to sign-ups](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=2981.0)
  - [Challenge with mobile sign-ups (site not optimized for mobile yet)](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=3000.0)

### Product Updates

  - [Introducing new pricing plans starting at $10 for 50 credits](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=2717.0)
  - [Focusing on improving payment flow to convert activated users](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=2712.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Chris to select 1-2 topics for calibration articles (can be done async via Slack)](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=1864.0)
  - [fwd.digital team to create initial articles and share for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=1910.0)
  - [Explore options for improving mobile user experience and conversion](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=3000.0)
  - [Set up async reporting via Slack, with meetings as needed for deeper discussions](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=3194.0)
  - [fwd.digital to begin content creation process, iterating based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/kCyy7zui9amEhkzjsCf1VqMQyvNJbZgW?tab=summary&timestamp=1910.0)
